entities.description: As a subsection of '3.3 热成像图', this section presents the thermal imaging results of the wide-temperature core board under different operating conditions, including temperature measurement points and their corresponding thermal distribution.
Refers to the industrial core board designed for wide-temperature operation, which is the subject of the thermal imaging analysis in this section.
Refers to the thermal imaging technique used to visualize temperature distribution on the core board, as described in this section.
Refers to specific points on the core board where temperature readings are taken, as indicated in the thermal imaging results.

relations.description: The '宽温级核心板' is the primary subject of this section, which focuses on its thermal imaging analysis.
The '热成像' technique is the method used to analyze the thermal behavior of the core board in this section.
The '温度测量点' are the specific locations on the core board where thermal data is collected and visualized.
